name: conservation-flow
title: Conservation Insight — Crop & Practice Flow
subtitle: acreage flow, adoption trend & the vital-few practices
description: A conservation-insight flow showcase — a crop-to-practice acreage Sankey, a multi-practice adoption trend over time, a crop-mix waffle, and a Pareto of enrolled acreage by practice.

dataAccesses.name: FlowKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT SUM(acres) AS tracked_acres, COUNT(DISTINCT crop) AS crop_count, ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS avg_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT practice) AS practices FROM v_crop_practice

dataAccesses.name: CropToPractice
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT crop, practice, SUM(acres) AS acres FROM v_crop_practice GROUP BY 1,2

dataAccesses.name: PracticeTrend
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT report_year AS year, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN practice='Cover crops' THEN pct END),1) AS coverCrops_pct, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN practice='No-till' THEN pct END),1) AS noTill_pct FROM v_practice_adoption GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: AcresByCrop
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT crop, SUM(acres) AS acres FROM v_crop_practice GROUP BY 1

dataAccesses.name: AcresByPractice
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT practice, SUM(acres) AS acres FROM v_crop_practice GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

kpis.label: Tracked Acres
kpis.info: Total acreage covered across every crop and practice.

kpis.label: Crops Tracked
kpis.info: Distinct crops represented in the dataset.

kpis.label: Avg Adoption
kpis.info: Average adoption rate across all crop/practice pairs.

panels.title: Acreage Flow — Crop to Practice
panels.info: Which crops are enrolled under which conservation practice.

panels.title: Adoption Trend
panels.info: Adoption rate over time for the two leading practices.

panels.title: Acres by Crop
panels.info: Every square is a share of tracked acreage by crop.

panels.title: Enrolled Acres by Practice
panels.info: The vital-few practices carrying most of the enrolled acreage.
